examples: The newscast covers topical events and entertainment.
He worked in the news division of ABC – he was the anchor of its 15-minute evening newscast.
Radio and television anchors usually appear on more than one newscast per day.
Lemon joined CNN after serving as a co-anchor for the 5 p.m. newscast for NBC5 News in Chicago.
As far back as I can remember, I have always dreamt of creating my own newscast.
